html:
Exclusive to:

“Some character named Jimbo wants you to play a card game with him.
To start, you should choose one of three Jokers. Each has a different way to give you a little edge in the game.
Second, play Poker. You can choose cards to discard and replace with new cards. You can do that twice.
Then your hand will be evaluated. You will get chips based on the value of your cards. You will get a Multiplier based on the quality of your hand. Your Chips times your Multiplier is your points. Get as many points as you can. Jimbo might give you something for your time.”

-

JIMBO Set Piece

The JIMBO is a special, naturally spawning structure that can be found in its Set Piece. Players can interact with JIMBO to play a game similar to Balatro, which itself is similar to Poker. The player can score points and if the player scores too little points or leaves the game while playing, they will receive a penalty. If they finish a game with enough points, they will receive a reward instead.

The JIMBO provides light that can protect players from Darkness.

Contents

  • 1 Game
    • 1.1 Jokers
    • 1.2 Scores
    • 1.3 Rewards
  • 2 Trivia
  • 3 Gallery
  • 4 Sounds

Game

To play the game:

  1. Pick Joker: Player has to choose one Joker from the 3 options. They can exit and reopen the game menu to reroll the Jokers. Exiting during the game will spawn hostile Monsters.
  2. Discard: Player can choose which cards to discard and draw new cards. This can be done twice.
  3. Evaluate and Reward: JIMBO calculates the number of Chips and gives something based on the score. Exiting during this final phase instead of waiting for the end of JIMBO's calculation will still grant the player the reward they've earned.

Jokers

Character Effect Character Effect Character Effect

Wilson 		Each pair in hand +3 mult
Willow 		Each face card discarded +20 chips
Wolfgang 		Each King in hand +25 chips

Wendy 		Each discard that becomes the same suit +5 chips +2 mult
WX-78 		Each heart kept once then discarded +2 mult
Wickerbottom 		Each Queen in hand +1 mult

Woodie 		Each card discarded +7 chips
Wes 		Hand is worse after discard +30 chips
Maxwell 		Each heart discarded +1 mult

Wigfrid 		Each Spade in hand +25 chips
Webber 		Each Heart or Diamond replaced by a club or spade +2 mult
Warly 		Hand contains a heart, a club, a diamond and a spade +4 mult

Winona 		Each heart kept +1 mult
Wortox 		Each heart discarded +15 chips
Each heart in hand -11 chips +1 mult
Wormwood 		Each club kept +15 chips

Wurt 		Each face card kept +10 chips per face card
Walter 		For each different suit in discard +15 chips
Wanda 		Start with 80 chips
Each discard -15 chips

Scores

When evaluating scores, JIMBO adds up the values of five cards: numbered cards use their face value, while A and J count as 11, Q as 12, and K as 13. The total is then multiplied by a score multiplier, which is determined by the type of hand and any bonus from the chosen Joker.

JIMBO gameplay
Hands Mult Description Example
High Card +1 No combination, the highest single card determines the value.
Pair +2 Two cards of the same rank.
Two Pair +3 Two different pairs of cards with the same rank.
Three of a Kind +4 Three cards of the same rank.
Straight +5 Five consecutive cards of any suit.
Flush +6 Five cards of the same suit, not in sequence.
Full House +7 Three of a kind combined with a pair.
Four of a Kind +8 Four cards of the same rank.
Straight Flush +9 Five consecutive cards of the same suit.
Royal Flush +10 A, K, Q, J, 10 all in the same suit.


Rewards

Condition Results Cards and Record
Exit game early x2 / x1 / x1 None
0 - 119 x4 / x2 / x3 None
120 - 149 x1 x1 None
150 - 199 x1 x1 None
200 - 399 x2 x4
400 - 599 x2 x5
600 - 999 x2 x7 x1
1000 - 1399 x8 x7 x1
1400 or higher x12 x1 x1 x1 x7 x1

Trivia

  • The JIMBO was added in the A Royal Welcome for Jimbo update.
  • The theoretical highest possible score attainable in the poker mini game is 4400. This can be obtained by picking Wurt and starting with 4 of the same face card, alongside any 5th face card. The first skip provides 250 chips, the second another 250, and the final count of cards provides 50. The mult for 4 of a kind is 8. 550 chips x 8 mult = 4400.
    • This is because Wurt's ability is exponential. The math for the chips provided is [the number of face cards] * [the number of face cards] * 10.

Gallery

  • JIMBO (outside its Set Piece) with Playing Cards
  • An unfinished version of Wilson's joker card, found in JIMBO's assets.
  • An unfinished version of Willow's joker card, found in JIMBO's assets.
  • An unfinished version of Wolfgang's joker card, found in JIMBO's assets.

Sounds

Balatro Theme when playing JIMBO mini game
plainText:
JIMBO
Quotes
JIMBO
Miscellaneous
"balatro_machine"
Exclusive to:
“I'm game for a game.”
–Wilson
“Let me win or I'll set you on fire.”
–Willow
“Is clown real? Wolfgang not afraid, just uncomfortable.”
–Wolfgang
“What more can I lose?”
–Wendy
“CALCULATING ODDS OF VICTORY...”
–WX-78
“One must know when the time for games has passed. Now is not that time.”
–Wickerbottom
“I know I promised, Luce. Just one more.”
–Woodie
“The game is rigged! But I'll play again to be sure.”
–Maxwell
“Sö be it! Yet öne möre röund, thöu knavish deceiver!”
–Wigfrid
“Prizes!”
–Webber
“What have I to lose?”
–Warly
“Hello clown face”
–Wormwood
“What could go wrong?”
–Winona
“Hey joker, let's play some poker!”
–Wortox
“So easy game!”
–Wurt
“Woby, let's take paws and play a few hands. Oh, Walter!”
–Walter
“Perhaps I have time for a round or two.”
–Wanda
